description:
You are working as a localization engineer on a small open-source project.  
A colleague has provided you with an updated French translation file that now needs to replace the currently shipped one.

Current filesystem layout:

1. /home/user/project/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/messages.po  
   • Out-of-date translation.  

2. /home/user/updates/fr.po  
   • New, corrected translation that must become the new messages.po file.

3. /home/user/update_logs/ (already exists, empty)  

Your assignment:

A. In a single, one-liner terminal command, copy /home/user/updates/fr.po so that it becomes /home/user/project/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/messages.po, completely overwriting the old file.  
B. In the very same command, append a log entry to /home/user/update_logs/2024-translation-update.log that confirms the operation.

Log-entry format (exactly one line; automated tests are case- and whitespace-sensitive):

2024-03-15 10:00:00  fr.po  →  /home/user/project/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/messages.po

Details the test suite will check:

• The replacement file /home/user/project/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/messages.po must be byte-for-byte identical to /home/user/updates/fr.po.  
• The file /home/user/update_logs/2024-translation-update.log must exist and contain exactly the single log line shown above (no leading/trailing blank lines).  
• /home/user/updates/fr.po should remain in place (it is only copied, not moved).

Only one composite shell command is necessary; do not split the task into multiple separate commands.

When you have finished, display the contents of /home/user/update_logs/2024-translation-update.log so the user can visually confirm the correct log entry.
truth:
Initial state before the task starts:

Directories:
- /home/user/project/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/      (0755)
- /home/user/updates/                             (0755)
- /home/user/update_logs/                         (0755)

Files and their contents (all ASCII):

1) /home/user/project/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/messages.po
# French translations – OLD
msgid "Hello"
msgstr "Bonjour (old)"
msgid "Bye"
msgstr "Au revoir (old)"

2) /home/user/updates/fr.po
# French translations – NEW
msgid "Hello"
msgstr "Bonjour"
msgid "Bye"
msgstr "Au revoir"

No log file is present yet.

Expected state after successful completion:

1) /home/user/project/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/messages.po
# French translations – NEW
msgid "Hello"
msgstr "Bonjour"
msgid "Bye"
msgstr "Au revoir"

2) /home/user/update_logs/2024-translation-update.log
2024-03-15 10:00:00  fr.po  →  /home/user/project/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/messages.po

• The new messages.po must exactly match /home/user/updates/fr.po (byte-wise).  
• /home/user/updates/fr.po is unchanged.
name: task_000000_1ae11682
